summary: Lead synthesis finds the M7 UI/localization/visual quality track complete enough to serve as a prerequisite input for future M7 content-lock and exit validation, with explicit limitations. All tracked UI/localization/visual quality tasks are CLOSED; current gates pass locally; no product code is changed by this task. Edge/Firefox browser rows and Windows DPI 150% remain unresolved/follow-up evidence, not passed full-platform coverage. Formal content lock and any manual human judgment acceptance remain Human Gates outside this task.

Passed; format, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed.

accepted visual/UX handoff; guidance is downstream input only, not new system authorization.
system/en-US/zh-CN client i18n foundation, locale-family canonicalization, persisted preference migration, safe storage fallback, Storybook/Playwright coverage.
presentation-only design tokens and neutral placeholder asset slots; no final art or cultural asset approval.

map presentation productization, systems_architect ACCEPT, QA ACCEPT, read-model authority preserved.

static neutral audio/art/localization coverage evidence and read-model projection; formal content lock still future Human Gate.

agent-operated local preview playthrough evidence only; manual human acceptance remains Human Gate if required.

architecture_boundary_check.sim_core_i18n_react_pixi_electron_node_i: PASS by architecture check and accepted task evidence: sim-core remains free of i18n/React/Pixi/Electron/DOM/Node IO authority coupling.
architecture_boundary_check.ui_authority: PASS: UI surfaces remain read-model/session/control layers and do not own authoritative WorldState.
architecture_boundary_check.pixi_boundary: PASS: accepted map presentation keeps Pixi render-cache/read-model boundary.
architecture_boundary_check.command_parity: PASS: appointment/governance/campaign player flows continue through GameCommand/query/read-model surfaces; no duplicated domain rules authorized.
architecture_boundary_check.debug_player_separation: PASS_WITH_LIMITS: UI regression matrix covers no debug/prototype text in player-mode paths; explicit dev/debug affordances remain allowed where scoped.
architecture_boundary_check.locale_policy: PASS_WITH_NOTE: zh-CN player locale is supported; prior zh-CN/zh-Hans drift is handled through i18n foundation/canonicalization and platform matrix expectedLang normalization.

quality_evidence.storybook_build: PASS with existing plugin timing and chunk-size warnings.
quality_evidence.playwright_e2e: PASS Chromium 23/23, including language switch, player guidance, appointment, map, viewport, platform matrix, and UI regression matrix coverage.
quality_evidence.no_debug_text: PASS by M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 evidence for covered player-mode surfaces.
quality_evidence.console_errors: PASS by M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 evidence for covered scenarios.
quality_evidence.viewports: PASS for accepted Chromium-supported matrix; Windows DPI 150% remains unresolved/follow-up.
quality_evidence.platform_matrix: PASS_WITH_LIMITS: Chrome/Chromium and Windows smoke covered; Edge/Firefox blocked-by-tooling rows remain unresolved and must be carried by M7 exit/content-lock claims.

decisions: Recommend ACCEPT for this UI/localization exit evidence only after systems_architect and qa_reviewer confirm boundaries and limitations.
Do not claim full Edge/Firefox/DPI150 platform coverage; carry these as unresolved limitations into M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 and M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001.
Do not treat visual handoff, placeholder slots, or audio/art/localization coverage as final production art or cultural-symbol approval.

Do not activate a Human Gate now; formal content lock, production art/cultural choices, manual human acceptance, release/commercial, telemetry/accounts/secrets, cloud-save implementation, server/multiplayer, and manual node battle reversal remain separate Human Gates if requested.
risks: M7-PLATFORM-EDGE-FIREFOX-UNRESOLVED remains open until browser tooling/projects are added and rerun.
M7-WINDOWS-DPI-150-UNRESOLVED remains open until a dedicated DPI harness exists.
M7 UI/localization exit is prerequisite evidence only and must not be represented as formal content lock approval or M7 Gate PASS.
Static neutral art/audio slots are coverage evidence, not production cultural assets.
requested_action: Review architecture boundaries, evidence synthesis, Human Gate preservation, and unresolved platform rows before independent QA review.
